ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock (e.g., AAPL) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company associated with the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the industry the company belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Specific industry of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering date */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of shares traded */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price after accounting for dividends and splits */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend paid on the stock */,
  "split_coefficient" REAL /* Split coefficient due to stock splits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traders" (
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trader */,
  "trader_name" TEXT /* Full name of the trader */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trader */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the trader on the platform */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the trader */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the trader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade order */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader placing the order */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being traded */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares in the order */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the order is placed */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "stop_loss" REAL /* Stop-loss price to limit losses */,
  "take_profit" REAL /* Take-profit price to lock in gains */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the order expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_orders_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_orders_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_executions" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade execution */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related trade order */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date when the trade was executed */,
  "execution_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "execution_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares executed */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the execution */,
  "fees" REAL /* Additional fees for the execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_executions_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES trade_orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance log entry */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader being reviewed */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance check (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments regarding the compliance check */,
  "reviewed_by" TEXT /* Name of the compliance officer who reviewed the trade */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the trade was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_logs_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price drop, volume spike) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "urgency" TEXT /* Urgency level of the alert (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader being assessed */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the risk assessment */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Level of risk identified (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments regarding the assessment */,
  "recommended_actions" TEXT /* Recommended actions to mitigate risks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price history entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to this entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "opening_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "closing_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "highest_price" REAL /* Highest price during the trading day */,
  "lowest_price" REAL /* Lowest price during the trading day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total volume traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_logs" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction log */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader making the transaction */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with this transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of money involved in the transaction */,
  "fee" REAL /* Transaction fee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_logs_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES trade_orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_logs_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate */,
  "base_currency" TEXT /* Base currency for the exchange rate */,
  "quote_currency" TEXT /* Quote currency for the exchange rate */,
  "rate" REAL /* Exchange rate value */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the exchange rate was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to this dividend */,
  "ex_dividend_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock goes ex-dividend */,
  "dividend_payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the dividend is paid */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
